content.body:
detectParentDirs only walked up — when cwd was at the top of the
hierarchy (e.g. ~/Github with org folders below), no parents were
found and the wizard showed only "this project only".

Add cwdScopeRole() which scans children and grandchildren for .git/
to determine if cwd is a user/org scope. buildScopeOptions and
resolveScopeChoice now use this to show the correct label.

Fixes the wizard showing only 2 options when run from ~/Github.
content.subject: fix(scope): detect cwd role when it contains repos below
content.summary:
